_comment: Phantom MCP — recommended LM Studio settings. Context must be >= 32768 for screenshots to work reliably.
notes: Set context_length to 32768 minimum in LM Studio model settings.
Screenshots are now JPEG-compressed at 1280px max — safe at 32k context.
Shell and file outputs are capped to prevent overflow.
If you still hit context limits, reduce MAX_WIDTH in tools/pc_vision.py to 960.
